summary: The round-1 production-wiring defect is resolved. PLAN now derives a fail-closed, syntactically validated worker App bot login, passes it explicitly to provenance-orphan enumeration, and CLAIM cross-checks the same configured identity against the successfully minted App slug before trusting the plan accounting. The live-workflow self-test exercises the previously missing production call-site pin and has non-vacuous negative cases for absent, divergent, and unforwarded wiring. The v5 orphan rows are strictly validated, deterministically ordered, inert (accounting only), bounded before log/summary use, and covered by meaningful enumeration and malformed-plan tests. I found no new correctness, security, fail-closed, or test-validity issue in the diff.
